title: Vintage Papercraft Travel Magazine Cover AI
sourceTitle: Vintage Papercraft Travel Magazine Cover AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium vintage travel magazine cover for Lisbon, featuring yellow tram, azulejo wall, ocean overlook, and castle silhouette as a layered papercraft destination diorama. Subject: ISSUE 07 supplies the swappable issue number detail for this template. yellow tram, azulejo wall, ocean overlook, and castle silhouette becomes the dominant central focal point, rendered as intricate layered paper-cut architecture with handcrafted shadows and miniature-world storytelling. Scene: Supporting cityscape, authentic local architecture, famous transportation, food details, small traveler notes, antique compass, and sparse black-and-white doodles surround the landmark naturally. Composition: Vertical 4:5 magazine cover: Destination Series header above large title VISIT LISBON, issue number below title, hero landmark at center, antique brass compass in lower foreground, and balanced editorial travel spacing. Signature Elements: Preserved vintage papercraft travel magazine cover source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Collectible luxury travel magazine cover blending vintage explorer journals, sophisticated destination advertising, papercraft diorama depth, and polished editorial design. Color Palette: Warm vintage paper tones, destination-specific accents, brass compass gold, subtle ink doodles, layered paper shadows, and refined travel-magazine contrast. Lighting: Soft crafted-paper light with realistic depth, tiny cut-paper shadows, warm cover glow, and crisp landmark separation. Typography: VISIT LISBON appears as the large elegant cover title, with Destination Series header and issue number kept readable and secondary. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
